>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> from main import *
I2C devices: ['0x1e', '0x68']
MPU6050 OK @ 0x68  [+/-8g, +/-2000dps, 50Hz]
HMC5883L OK @ 0x1E  [+/-1.3Ga, 15Hz, 8-avg]
# Ready. 9-channel HAR firmware.
#   test()               — single reading
#   calibrate_mag(sec)   — mag ellipsoid data collection
#   collect('label', sec)  — activity data collection
>>>
calibrate_mag(60)
# MAG_CALIB 60s 3000samples
